# Bug: --shout ignored when combined with --formal

> Bug ID: HELLO-BUG-002
> Severity: major
> Status: ✅ fixed
> Reported: 2026-05-31

## Description

When running `hello Alice --formal --shout`, the greeting is not shouted. The --shout flag works for the informal greeting but is silently ignored for the formal greeting. Expected: GREETINGS, ALICE. Actual: Greetings, Alice. Reproduce: `hello Alice --formal --shout`
